MISHNAH: The reason for the institution of the stand men (guards) is because it is said (Num. 28, 2) Command the children of Israel, and say unto them: My offering, my bread for my sacrifices … shall ye observe, etc. How can an offering be brought for a person without his being present [when it is sacrificed]? Therefore did the first prophets institute twenty-four watches (divisions); each watch…

And he said, That thou mayest take the seven lambs from my hand, to be a testimony for me that I have digged this well.
And Abraham set seven lambs apart and separated them from the oxen.
Therefore he called that well the Well of the Seven Lambs; because there they two did swear.
And he said, That thou mayest take the seven lambs from my hand, to be a testimony for me that I have digged this well.

sheep, each a year old, and a kid of the goats, that he might make atonement thereby for himself 4and his sons. And he prepared the kid first, and placed some of its blood on the flesh that was on

שעיר עזים [ONE] KID OF THE GOATS — in order to make expiation for the “selling of Joseph” with reference to whom it states, (Genesis 37:31) “and they slaughtered a kid of the goats” (Numbers Rabbah 13:13).
sheep, each a year old, and a kid of the goats, that he might make atonement thereby for himself 4and his sons. And he prepared the kid first, and placed some of its blood on the flesh that was on

הנה שלחתי את הגדי הזה BEHOLD, I SENT THIS KID — Because Judah had deceived his father through a kid of the goats — for he had dipped Joseph’s coat in its blood — therefore he, too, was deceived through a kid of the goats (Genesis Rabbah 85:9).
